title: Prompt Lifecycle, Monitoring, and Production Capstone · Prompt Lens: Regression Gates
summary: Ship and maintain a cross-provider prompt system with regression evidence. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt regression gates increment in a production prompt portfolio and release gate. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Block prompt releases on material deterministic, rubric, safety, or human-review regressions.
Store owners, versions, model assumptions, templates, and evaluation links in a prompt registry.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Regression Gates evidence
steps.instruction: Append a contract headed "Evidence: prompt-regression-gates-1qvow9" with concrete Goal, Context, Constraints, Output, and Done when sections tailored to this case.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Regression Gates into observable performance evidence.
